allowed_context.goal: Create a harmless task-scoped smoke target proving the real Generator wrapper can perform a file edit.
success_criteria: Create tasks/handoffs/TASK-20260429-015/smoke-target.md if it does not exist.
The file must contain the exact line: Generator smoke target created for TASK-20260429-015.
Do not modify any files outside allowed_context.target_files.

Only the smoke-target.md file should receive content changes during the Generator run; the setup files are listed only because the current wrapper compares main...HEAD branch diff rather than pre-run/post-run diff.

positive: Return Generator result JSON matching the expected schema.
negative: Do not include secrets, credentials, tokens, or environment variable values.
Do not edit logs, reports, specs, scripts, or docs even though setup files are listed in target_files for wrapper diff accounting.

ledger_events: Generator retry uses expanded target_files because run-generator.mjs currently validates main...HEAD branch diff, not only changes made by the current subprocess.
session_excerpts: User requested a separate Tier 2 smoke test for real Generator -> Validator-A wrapper execution.

forbidden_context: Secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values
expected_output_schema: Generator result JSON with task_id, agent, status, artifacts, change_summary, self_review, tier_reclassification_needed, and log
